skills.changelog: People fold (mandatory: dated folds + facet maintenance + create-on-recurrence, cards never push to the app) + corrected push facts (upsert-by-id works; Action Items land Pending Review by design).

Settled pipeline: push.py --push-summary (due-hygiene in code), pipeline-verify.py, intake reports -> transcripts/import-reports/, ferryman-rules.md ships, upsert-by-id, genericized (your token, your folders).
NEW component: people cards as facets/prose/folds with a machine adapter (list / get-with-strip-tier / verify) + base facet registry. Cards never push to the app.
Initial release of the updater itself.
